comments.author: @LUISA-rj8oe
comments.text:
Io mi domando cosa mangiano
coloro che abitano in queste isole.
Io ho visto solo pecore.
Il clima è talmente freddo che
non ci sono alberi da frutto.
Non ci sono campi coltivati e
credo che neanche le patate
possano crescere in un
ambiente simile.
Mah ... !

comments.author: @ChanelNatureTravel4K
comments.text: The atmosphere in this video is incredibly peaceful and immersive.

comments.author: @nikisefe629
comments.text: Noch nie so eine unpassende Stimme für eine Doku gehört..

comments.author: @ThaoNguyen-mw5vn
comments.text: It's truly admirable how the people of the Faroe Islands have built their lives and communities in such a remote yet breathtaking environment. The small villages nestled among mountains, dramatic cliffs, and the vast ocean create a landscape that is both peaceful and awe-inspiring. Life here reflects a strong connection between people and nature, making the Faroe Islands one of the most unique places in the world.
